items.body:
🔴 **Tool Issue** — `usageManagementContext.ts:37`

```ts
const userAgentInfo = `azsdk-js-arm-commerce/1.0.0-beta.1`;
```

The `userAgentInfo` version is hardcoded to `1.0.0-beta.1`, but the package version in `package.json` is `4.0.0-beta.4`. This causes incorrect telemetry to be sent to the service.

**Fix:** Update the version string to match the package version:
```ts
const userAgentInfo = `azsdk-js-arm-commerce/4.0.0-beta.4`;
```
Please also report this in the [generation tool repository](https://github.com/Azure/autorest.typescript/issues) as the emitter consistently generates the wrong version for this package.

1 tool issue found:

- **Version mismatch in `userAgentInfo`**: `usageManagementContext.ts:37` has `azsdk-js-arm-commerce/1.0.0-beta.1` but the package version is `4.0.0-beta.4`. This is the same bug seen in the prior generation attempt (PR #37941) and needs to be fixed in the generation tool.

No API design issues were found with the public surface (`arm-commerce-node.api.md`).

<details>
<summary>📊 Structured Report</summary>

```json
{"agent":"mgmt-reviewer","pr":38015,"summary":"issues_found","findings":[{"file":"sdk/commerce/arm-commerce/src/api/usageManagementContext.ts","line":37,"issueType":"tool","category":"version-mismatch","description":"userAgentInfo set to azsdk-js-arm-commerce/1.0.0-beta.1 but package version is 4.0.0-beta.4"}]}
```

</details>

## Next Steps to Merge
Only failed checks and required actions are listed below.

- 🔄 **pnpm-lock conflict**: `pnpm-lock.yaml` has a merge conflict (`mergeable_state: dirty`). Auto-fix was attempted but could not complete due to registry authentication constraints in this environment. Please follow the [conflict guide](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-js/blob/main/documentation/resolve-pnpm-lock-merge-conflict.md) to resolve manually.
- ℹ️ **Draft PR**: CI pipelines (ADO `js - PullRequest`) have not run yet. Mark the PR as ready for review to trigger them.
